# 🎯 Release v0.1.0 – Playwright Core & First Test

{{RELEASE_METADATA}}

## 📌 Release Summary
This release brings the first fully functional test into the framework. Playwright and TestNG are now operational, and the `TC_001` test case validates the core automation capabilities on a live website.

## 🛠️ Changes since v0.0.0

### Added
- **Playwright 1.59.0** and **TestNG 7.12.0** as Maven dependencies
- First test case: `TC_001` – automates DemoQA Text Box form
- Surefire plugin configuration for test execution

### Changed
- `pom.xml` version → `0.1.0` (no -SNAPSHOT for release)

### Fixed
- N/A (initial feature release)

## ✅ Quality Assurance
- [x] POM validation passes strict mode (milestone v0.1.0)
- [x] `mvn clean test` succeeds on CI (GitHub Actions)
- [x] All checks in `main-ci.yml` pass (build, security, quality)
- [x] Manual verification on local machine

## 📊 Test Execution Example

```bash
$ mvn clean test
...
Tests run: 1, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0
[INFO] BUILD SUCCESS
```

## 🔄 Post-Merge Automation
After merging this PR to `main`, the `release-pr.yml` workflow will:

- Create signed tag `v0.1.0`
- Generate GitHub Release with auto-notes
- Bump `dev` to `0.2.0-SNAPSHOT`
- Open a version bump PR (`chore/bump-to-0.2.0-SNAPSHOT`)

## 📝 Notes
- No breaking changes
- Framework is now ready for logging and config management (`v0.2.0`)

**Release Manager:** ANUJ KUMAR
